description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a solid, wedge-shaped metal head. The head is painted a bright orange-red color, making it highly visible and easy to locate in urban or outdoor environments. The blade is broad and flat with a sharp edge, suitable for chopping wood or other materials, while the opposite side of the head is squared off, functioning as a poll for striking. The handle is ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip, with a natural wood finish that contrasts with the vivid head. The overall construction suggests durability and practical use, with no visible decorative elements or branding. This tool is commonly found in garages, maintenance sheds, or utility vehicles in urban settings.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a bright orange-red metal head, designed for chopping and striking tasks. The tool is sturdy, ergonomic, and highly visible.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, orange-red axe head with a sharp blade edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same curved handle and the squared poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the axe head and the V-shaped junction where the handle meets the head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and natural finish.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade with a sharp edge and squared poll, painted orange-red for visibility.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle.
